examples: A dimwitted, meanspirited spawn embodying the nation's worst flaws, failings and nightmares.
If only I wasn't so dimwitted; if only I understood how I was to blame for the flaw that granny abhorred so much.
Is Kutcher as dimwitted as was his character Michael Kelso in That 70s Show?
The blog Ace of Spades HQ called Bush "incompetent" and "embarrassingly dimwitted" and urged him to retire.
